title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Software Engineer at Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates has an exciting opening for a Software Engineer at our Madurai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates:
Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in JavaScript

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zensar Technologies Asia Pacific Associates!
